name: Pasta pantry overlap
notes: A tomato-based pasta recipe should rank at the top.

name: Fried rice pantry overlap
notes: A fried-rice style recipe should surface clearly.

name: Breakfast vegetable overlap
notes: Vegetable omelette should be the best fit.

name: Salad pantry overlap
notes: Normalization should map plurals to the salad recipe.

name: Alias-heavy pantry overlap
notes: Alias handling should still surface the salad as a near match.

name: Partial egg overlap
notes: No strong match should exist, but a useful partial recipe should still be returned.

name: Very weak pantry input
notes: No filler recipes should be returned.

name: Tomato and aromatics overlap
notes: The pasta dish currently clears the strong-match threshold with this overlap.

name: Chicken rice overlap
notes: Chicken fried rice should remain a strong match.

name: Vague invalid input
notes: This should be rejected by validation rather than evaluated like a real query.
